backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing a lemon billing backend with customer management, transactions, credit payments, and role-based access control using AccessControl/MixinAuthorization mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that converts old actor state (Nat-based monetary/quantity fields) to new state using Float types for customers, transactions, balances, and credit payment records.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three completed features: updating TransactionEntryForm, AddCustomerModal, and useTransactionCalculations to support decimal/float input instead of integers.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Aggregated one-line summaries of all frontend source files, documenting the float/number migration across components, hooks, pages, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Lemon Billing PWA, including viewport meta tags, PWA manifest link, app icons, and service worker registration script.
frontend/public/manifest.webmanifest: PWA web app manifest for Lemon Billing App defining name, icons, display mode, theme/background colors, and app categories.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing versioned cache management with cache-first strategies for static assets and navigation, bypassing Internet Identity and IC canister network calls.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up the TanStack Router with four routes (home, customer detail, bill summary, my summary) wrapped in a Layout and LanguageProvider, with lazy-loaded page components.
frontend/src/components/AddCustomerModal: A dialog modal for adding a new customer with name, phone, and previous credit fields, handling offline state, authentication checks, and form validation before calling the addCustomer mutation.
frontend/src/components/BillLayout.tsx: Renders a styled bill receipt card displaying customer info, transaction details (quantity, rate, total), and balance summary (previous credit, net credit) for a given customer and transaction.
frontend/src/components/CreditPaymentLis: Displays a single credit payment transaction as an expandable list item with payment amount, resulting balance, date, and a delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/CustomerDashboar: Shows a customer summary card with avatar, phone number, current credit balance, and account creation date using a lemon-yellow gradient style.
frontend/src/components/CustomerListItem: Renders a single customer row as a navigable link showing avatar, name, phone, last transaction date, previous due badge, and current credit balance.
frontend/src/components/InstallAppBanner: Displays a PWA install prompt banner that supports native install on Android and shows step-by-step iOS Safari instructions via a dialog, with a dismiss option.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component that renders a sticky header with navigation, language selector, and an offline/sync status banner showing pending changes and sync state.
frontend/src/components/LoadingSpinner.t: Simple full-screen loading spinner component with a spinning yellow border circle and a 'Loading...' label.
frontend/src/components/SummaryBanner.ts: Displays a three-card summary grid showing total customers, total lemons sold, and total credit due using data from a LemonSummary object.
frontend/src/components/TransactionEntry: Form component for adding a new lemon transaction, accepting date, quantity, rate, and debit inputs, with live credit calculations and navigation to the generated bill on success.
frontend/src/components/TransactionListI: Expandable list item displaying a single transaction's date, quantity, rate, total, and balance, with a delete confirmation dialog and navigation to the bill view.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: React context provider that manages the active language (en/hi/mr/kn), persists it to localStorage, and exposes a translation lookup function `t`.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfflineSync.ts: Custom hook that manages offline/online detection and syncs queued operations (addCustomer, addTransaction, payCreditDue) to the backend actor when connectivity is restored, updating React Query caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWAInstall.ts: Custom hook that handles PWA installation prompts, tracking the deferred install event, iOS Safari detection, installed state, and user dismissal with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for data fetching and mutations (user profile, customers, transactions, credit payments), with offline queuing support via enqueueOperation when the device is offline.
frontend/src/hooks/useTransactionCalcula: Custom hook that computes derived transaction values—total amount and net credit balance—from quantity, rate, previous credit, and today's payment inputs using useMemo.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines a translations object with string keys for all UI text across English, Hindi, Marathi, and Kannada languages, exporting a Language type and the translations map.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines a lemon-themed CSS custom property palette for light and dark modes, and adds print-specific styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query, InternetIdentity authentication, and the root App component into the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/BillSummaryView.tsx: Page component that displays a printable bill for a specific customer transaction, with buttons to print or share via WhatsApp, fetching customer and transaction data via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDetailPage.ts: Displays a detailed view of a single customer, including their balance, unified transaction and credit payment history, a transaction entry form, credit payment form, and customer deletion functionality.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the main home page with a customer list, summary banner, add-customer modal, and login/profile-setup screens for unauthenticated or new users.
frontend/src/pages/MySummaryPage.tsx: Shows an aggregated business summary page with metric cards for total customers, lemons sold, rupees collected, credit due, and profit/loss.
frontend/src/utils/formatBillText.ts: Formats a customer transaction into a URL-encoded plain-text bill string using localized labels from the i18n translations.
frontend/src/utils/offlineQueue.ts: Implements an IndexedDB-backed offline queue for storing and managing pending mutations (addCustomer, addTransaction, payCreditDue) that need to sync when the app comes back online.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (including from hash-based routes), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (oklch-based design tokens, lemon brand palette), fonts, border radii, shadows, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3) for a feature branch focused on accepting decimal number inputs, listing completed features for float parsing in forms and hooks, and a pending backend task to migrate Motoko actor numeric fields from Int/Nat to Float.
